name: home-os
description: Turn a simple Logseq journal capture into a private, readable home manual.

interface.shortDescription: Build a readable home manual from journal captures.
interface.longDescription: Turns a nested #HomeCapture block into human-labeled home, room, appliance, system, manual, and source-review records while preserving every original photo and note.
defaultPrompt: Set up my Logseq Home OS.
Check whether Home OS is healthy.
